employees.title: Staff Directory
employees.subtitle: Manage all employees
employees.retirement_desc: You are about to remove {{name}}. Their access will be stopped immediately.

alerts.supervisor_reporting_rule: Supervisors must report to a Manager or higher.
alerts.supervisor_rank_rule: Check rank: Supervisor must report to a Manager or higher.
alerts.matrix_manager_desc: An additional manager assigned for specific projects or functional oversight.

employees.permanent_removal_desc: You are about to permanently delete "{{name}}". This cannot be undone.

leave.title: Leave
leave.subtitle: Manage your leave and team approvals
leave.explanation_text: Your total available leave is the sum of your current year's allocation and any balance brought forward from last year.
leave.pending_relief_count: You have {{count}} handover request(s) to approve.
leave.debt_alert_desc: You are using leave days from next year.
leave.debt_severe: You have no leave available for the next 2+ years.
leave.debt_recovery: You will have a zero balance for about {{years}} years.
leave.protocol_notice: Approval needed for leave to be valid

alerts.delete_confirm: Warning: This will permanently delete the request. Continue?

onboarding.title: Onboarding Journey
onboarding.subtitle: Track and manage your professional growth
onboarding.description: Your professional roadmap for a successful start. Complete these tasks to align with organizational standards and team workflows.
onboarding.no_tasks_tip: You have no pending onboarding tasks at this time.

manager.title: Onboarding Governance
manager.subtitle: Personnel Deployment Center
manager.description: Manage transitions and personnel induction across the organization. Monitor progress and ensure operational readiness.
manager.start_tip: Initiate your first personnel induction by clicking the Launch button above.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Manage salaries and payslips
payroll.registry_awaiting_tip: Select a pay period to view records.

appraisals.title: Performance History
appraisals.subtitle: Track your progress and past reviews.
appraisals.no_active_desc: You are not in a review cycle right now. You will be told when one starts.
appraisals.no_active_admin_desc: No review cycles have started, or you are not included in this review.

packet.title: Performance Review
packet.subtitle: A complete look at your goals and skills.
packet.summary_placeholder: Provide a clear summary of overall performance, key wins, and growth areas during this period.
packet.summary_placeholder_self: Summarize how you did. What did you finish and where can you do better?

validation.summary_required: Please provide an executive summary to continue.
validation.summary_too_short: The summary needs to be a bit longer (at least 11 characters).

packet.review_instruction: Please rate each skill and provide helpful feedback. Your input helps build an accurate performance picture.
packet.improvements_placeholder: What needs focus for next time?
packet.dev_plan_placeholder: What should be done next to grow?
packet.institutional_desc: Please review and confirm the final results. Once approved, this case will be officially closed.
packet.gap_desc: There is a big difference between the self-review and the manager's review. You can accept this or ask for a re-check.

goal_achievement.name: Goal Results
goal_achievement.desc: Meets or beats the targets and goals set for them.

productivity.name: Efficiency
productivity.desc: Uses time well and gets a lot done.

reliability.name: Reliability
reliability.desc: Does what they say they will do.

job_knowledge.name: Job Knowledge
job_knowledge.desc: Knows how to do their job well.

innovation.name: New Ideas
innovation.desc: Brings new and better ways of doing things.

customer_focus.name: Customer Care
customer_focus.desc: Helpful to customers and team members.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.desc: Changes well when things change at work.

punctuality.name: Punctuality
punctuality.desc: Comes to work and meetings on time.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.forgot_help: Ask HR to reset your password.

dashboard.gap_description: We are a bit behind on our targets.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hazmat_desc: Clears everything but main admin accounts.
settings.org_notice_desc: Changes here affect the whole system. Please check before saving.
settings.auto_termination_desc: Logout after no work is done.
settings.data_purge_desc: Deletes all temporary data (leave, payroll, goals) but keeps the company structure and main admins.

manager_dashboard.title: Manager Dashboard
manager_dashboard.subtitle: Track your team
manager_dashboard.guidance_desc: You have {{pendingReviews}} reviews and {{openLeaves}} leave requests to check

training.title: Training
training.subtitle: Browse programs and track your learning

it_admin.title: IT Admin
it_admin.subtitle: Manage users and access
it_admin.assets_desc: Go to the Asset List to manage tools.
it_admin.warning: Warning: Salary and leave must be setup by HR after creating an account.

employee_history.title: Staff History
employee_history.subtitle: Past records for this staff member

targets.title: Goals
targets.subtitle: Track your work goals and results

data_management.title: Data
data_management.subtitle: Backups and system reset
data_management.purge_desc: Deletes all temporary records while keeping the main structure. Cannot be undone.
data_management.purge_confirm: Warning: This delete everything permanently. Type CONFIRM to proceed.
data_management.export_hint: Download your data as a CSV file.

labels.confidential: Confidential Document. Unauthorized sharing is prohibited.
